assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9.
The dividend receivable gives rise to a foreign currency exposure.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies a fair value hedge as one of the three top-level hedge accounting models for a recognised asset or liability.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies a cash flow hedge as a distinct top-level hedge accounting model for exposure to variability in cash flows.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies a hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation as a separate top-level hedge accounting model relevant to foreign currency exposures.
